title: Fluorescently Labeled Polyamine Uptake via Flow Cytometry
author: Sarah van Veen

steps.title: The day of the experiment, remove...
steps.instruction: The day of the experiment, remove cell culture medium and add fluorescently labeled polyamines diluted in media to the cells in a final volume of 1000 µL, / well . Keep protected from light.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C with 5%...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C with 5% CO₂ for 2h, ensuring protection from light.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, /well 2% of BSA (0
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, /well 2% of BSA (0.7% solution) in PBS.

steps.title: Discard supernatants and resuspend cell pellets...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatants and resuspend cell pellets in 500 µL in BSA+PBS+DAPI (1:5000).

steps.title: Keep on ice until acquisition at the flow cytometer
steps.instruction: Keep on ice until acquisition at the flow cytometer. Record 10,000 live events per sample.

steps.title: Add 200 µL, /well TrypLE
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL, /well TrypLE. Incubate 00:05:00, at RT protected from light.

steps.title: Seed cells in a 12-well plate...
steps.instruction: Seed cells in a 12-well plate so they reach 70-80% confluency on the day of the experiment.

steps.title: Harvest cells and prepare samples for Flow Cytometry (FC)
steps.instruction: Harvest cells and prepare samples for Flow Cytometry (FC).

steps.title: Filter cell suspension through Nylon filter into FC tubes
steps.instruction: Filter cell suspension through Nylon filter into FC tubes.
